drl:
rule "R0"
salience 8
when
    T0(f2 contains "l", $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0)
    not T1(f0 < $b0_0_1)
    T0(!(f0 in (-1000000007, -2, 11) || f2 >= ""))
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f1 != true, f2 <= "a", $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1($p1_0.getF0()));
    insertLogical(new T1($b1_0_0));
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( $p2_0 : T1(f0 > 1.0, f0 > 0) )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T1(f0 > 1.0, f0 > 0) )
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience 4
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f1 != true, $b3_0_0 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1($p3_0.getF0()));
    insertLogical(new T1($p3_0.getF0()));
end
